codeReview.summary: Feature correctly normalizes Node.js version requirements across all three documentation files. The worker identified and fixed inconsistencies: tooling/ui-md-linter/README.md was changed from 'Node.js 14.x or later' to 'Node.js ≥18 (Node.js 18 LTS recommended)', and tooling/vscode-extension/README.md was changed from 'Node.js v16+' to 'Node.js ≥18 (Node.js 18 LTS recommended)'. Root README.md already had the correct 'Node.js ≥18' specification. All three files now consistently specify the same minimum version (≥18).

summary: PASS - All three README files (root, tooling/ui-md-linter, tooling/vscode-extension) now consistently specify 'Node.js ≥18' as the minimum version requirement. The worker followed the docs-worker skill procedure correctly and made appropriate changes to normalize the version specifications.
